metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.description: Detects credential stuffing attacks against retail authentication endpoints. Queries RetailShield_Logs_CL for Credential_Stuffing events with high FailedAttempts_d or SuspicionScore_d, sourced from the RetailShield log generator. Aligned with MITRE T1110.004 — Credential Stuffing.
